200.description: OK

priv.description: the clients RSA private key (AES encrypted using the password of the client and a predefined seed)

aes_key.description: the suites AES key (RSA encrypted using the clients public key)

post.description: Inserts initial PskRaster data in the database

parameters.name: init
parameters.description: informs the server to discard the previous data in this table

parameters.name: finish
parameters.description: informs the server to grant access to this table for other users as well as this table has finished the initial upload
